posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really helpful to have the ability to duplicate a template within the template center. Right now, the only way to create a variation on a template as a new template is start from a board.

My specific use case is that I am creating a new project intake process that start with a form. Depending on the project type selected, I want to automatically create the project board from a template. All templates will have consistent core elements, but each variation needs specific tasks related to the project type. The ability to duplicate templates and then modify would save some time in set up.
